title: Happiness Vector
description: 8-dimensional happiness feature vector for Cognitum Seed ingestion (ADR-065). Each dimension is normalized to [0, 1] where higher values indicate more positive affect.

prefixItems.description: Vector ID: node_id * 1000000 + type_offset + timestamp_component. Type offsets: 0=registration, 100000=heartbeat, 200000=happiness.
8-dim happiness vector: [happiness_score, gait_speed, stride_regularity, movement_fluidity, breathing_calm, posture_score, dwell_factor, social_energy]

dim_0_happiness_score.description: Composite happiness [0=sad, 0.5=neutral, 1=happy]. Weighted sum of dims 1-6.
dim_0_happiness_score.weights: gait=0.25, stride=0.15, fluidity=0.20, calm=0.20, posture=0.10, dwell=0.10

dim_1_gait_speed.description: Walking speed from CSI phase rate-of-change. Happy people walk ~12% faster.

dim_2_stride_regularity.description: Step interval consistency. Regular strides indicate confidence/positive affect.

dim_3_movement_fluidity.description: Smoothness of body movement trajectory. Jerky motion indicates anxiety.

dim_4_breathing_calm.description: Breathing rate mapped to calmness. Slow deep breathing = relaxed.

dim_5_posture_score.description: Upright vs slouched posture from RF scattering cross-section.
dim_5_posture_score.source: Amplitude coefficient of variation across subcarrier groups

dim_6_dwell_factor.description: How long the person stays in the sensing zone.
dim_6_dwell_factor.source: Fraction of recent frames with presence detected

dim_7_social_energy.source: Motion energy + dwell + heart rate proxy

properties.691_GAIT_ENERGY: Gait speed + stride regularity composite — emitted every 4th frame
properties.692_AFFECT_VALENCE: Breathing calm + fluidity + posture composite — emitted every 4th frame
properties.693_SOCIAL_ENERGY: Group animation level — emitted every 4th frame

seed_id_scheme.description: Vector ID encoding for Cognitum Seed
